parameters.query:
WITH de AS (
  SELECT id, brand, model, year, mileage, price::numeric de_price
  FROM moveadvisor_market_offers
  WHERE country='DE' AND price IS NOT NULL AND price>0 AND year IS NOT NULL AND mileage IS NOT NULL
),
comp AS (
  SELECT de.id, de.de_price, c.comps, c.es_median,
    (700 + 400 + 200 + 0.0475*de.de_price) AS cost,
    (c.es_median - de.de_price - (700 + 400 + 200 + 0.0475*de.de_price)) AS margin
  FROM de
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT count(*)::int comps, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY es.price::numeric) es_median
    FROM moveadvisor_market_offers es
    WHERE COALESCE(es.country,'ES')='ES' AND es.price IS NOT NULL AND es.price>0
      AND lower(es.brand)=lower(de.brand) AND lower(es.model)=lower(de.model)
      AND es.year BETWEEN de.year-1 AND de.year+1
      AND es.mileage BETWEEN de.mileage*0.7 AND de.mileage*1.3
  ) c
)
UPDATE moveadvisor_market_offers m SET
  market_price_es   = round(comp.es_median),
  import_comps      = comp.comps,
  import_cost       = round(comp.cost),
  import_margin     = round(comp.margin),
  import_margin_pct = round((comp.margin / NULLIF(comp.es_median,0))::numeric, 3),
  import_score      = CASE WHEN comp.comps>=15 AND comp.margin>0 THEN round(comp.margin) ELSE 0 END,
  import_published  = CASE WHEN m.import_locked THEN m.import_published
                      ELSE (comp.comps>=15 AND comp.margin>=1500
                            AND comp.margin/NULLIF(comp.es_median,0) BETWEEN 0.10 AND 0.50) END,
  import_scored_at  = NOW()
FROM comp WHERE m.id = comp.id;
